div.head: Unknown elements
div.p: Elements not defined in the editor's schema are not dropped. Instead they are synthesized so they stay editable and round-trip back to XML. Inline unknowns like the one above appear with a coloured marker.
div.ab: This whole block is an unknown element. Block-level unknowns are tagged in the reading pane so you can see they aren't part of the schema. Toggle the source view (</>) to confirm it serializes back unchanged.
div.p: Attributes seen on an unknown element are preserved too — select the block above and check the attribute panel.
